title: JSA acts on Aerchain $13 million Series A fundraise
description: Bengaluru-based enterprise procurement platform Agillos E-Commerce Private Limited (Aerchain) has raised $13 million from a Series A fundraise led by Pavestone Technology Fund, with participation from IndiaMART and other investors.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised lead investor Pavestone Technology Fund on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Siddharth Mody (Partner), with support from Anurag Shrivastav (Partner), Niharika Rao (Senior Associate) and Prakhar Jain (Associate).The due dil
